notableEvents.label: Coby Mayo reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Coby Mayo reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Cole Young.

notableEvents.label: Tyler O'Neill GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler O'Neill grounds into a double play, shortstop Cole Young to second baseman Ryan Bliss to first baseman Josh Naylor. Coby Mayo to 3rd. Jackson Holliday out at 2nd. Tyler O'Neill out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Tyler O'Neill rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler O'Neill grounds into a double play, shortstop Cole Young to second baseman Ryan Bliss to first baseman Josh Naylor. Coby Mayo to 3rd. Jackson Holliday out at 2nd. Tyler O'Neill out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Alex Hoppe. Coby Mayo scores.

notableEvents.label: Samuel Basallo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Samuel Basallo challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Samuel Basallo called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Mitch Garver reaches on a fielding error by pitcher Keegan Akin.

notableEvents.label: Blaze Alexander pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Blaze Alexander lines out to right fielder Victor Robles.

notableEvents.label: Jeremiah Jackson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jeremiah Jackson singles on a ground ball to third baseman Patrick Wisdom.

notableEvents.label: Samuel Basallo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Samuel Basallo reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by pitcher José A. Ferrer. Jeremiah Jackson scores. Tyler O'Neill to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Jeremiah Jackson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Umpire reviewed (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Jeremiah Jackson reaches on a fielder's choice out, third baseman Patrick Wisdom to catcher Mitch Garver. Blaze Alexander out at home. Leody Taveras to 2nd.
